text:
Routing fixes, stable UI tabs, and a return to pure ASCII. 

Merged a few nice quality-of-life updates this week. Gemini requests now route smoothly with Vertex fallbacks, so things just work. Local dev is a bit faster since we pre-fill localhost URIs for new app keys. Oh, and we reverted the Sirius elevator game back to its plain, pre-update ASCII glory. Sometimes the old ways are the best ways.

Code's open, as always. Link in bio to build something.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #webdev #asciiart #retrocomputing
